narrative:
Circleville 3-A (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,162 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.6 percentage points.
